subject: Swift trigger 1418333 is not an astrophysical source
body:
R. Gupta (NASA GSFC), N. P. M. Kuin (UCL-MSSL),
K. L. Page (U Leicester) and T. M. Parsotan (GSFC) report on behalf of
the Neil Gehrels Swift Observatory Team:

Trigger 1418333 was caused by particles in the South Atlantic Anomaly,
and is not an interesting, astrophysical event.
